# Skills Reference

## Programming Languages
Go (Golang), Python, TypeScript, Rust

## Infrastructure & Orchestration
Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, AWS, Helm

## Databases
PostgreSQL, Redis, MySQL, ClickHouse

## APIs & Communication
gRPC, REST, Protocol Buffers, GraphQL

## Observability
OpenTelemetry, distributed tracing, Prometheus, Grafana, structured logging

## Architecture
microservices, distributed systems, event-driven architecture, service mesh, cloud-native
